revision.text: <small><sup>{{{1}}}</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>{{{2}}}</sub></small>
{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}
{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}
{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}

{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} This template builds nicer looking common fractions, sample: 1+2⁄3. It takes three parameters: The integer (optionally with leading −), the numerator and the denominator. If your fraction is between zero and one you probably want to use {{[[Template:Frac0|frac0]]}} instead.

{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} This template builds nicer looking common fractions, sample: 1+2⁄3. It takes three parameters: The integer (optionally with leading −), the numerator and the denominator. If your fraction is between zero and one you probably want to use {{[[Template:Frac0|frac0]]}} instead. [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

revision.comment: Improve readability by removing small font; add space
revision.text: {{{1}}}+ {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} This template builds nicer looking common fractions, sample: 1+ 2⁄3. It takes three parameters: The integer (optionally with leading −), the numerator and the denominator. If your fraction is between zero and one you probably want to use {{[[Template:Frac0|frac0]]}} instead. [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

revision.comment: 1, 2 or 3 parameters; [[template:frac0]] can be deprecated now
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (with leading − if necessary), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

revision.comment: trying to keep fraction within standard line height
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Frac]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:frac]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|a|b|c}}: {{frac|a|b|c}} (integer, numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a|b}}: {{frac|a|b}} (numerator and denominator) ; {{frac|a}}: {{frac|a}} (denominator only) [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|Complex: {{#switch:{{{2}}} | 2 = {{#ifeq:{{{1}}} | 1 | ½ |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }} | 3 = {{#switch:{{{1}}} | 1 = ⅓ | 2 = ⅔ | {{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }} | 4 = {{#switch:{{{1}}} | 1 = ¼ | 2 = ½ | 3 = ¾ | {{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }} | 8 = {{#switch:{{{1}}} | 1 = ⅛ | 2 = ¼ | 3 = ⅜ | 4 = ½ | 5 = ⅝ | 6 = ¾ | 7 = ⅞ | {{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }} | {{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|Complex: {{#switch:{{{2}}} | 2 = {{#ifeq:{{{1}}} | 1 | ½ |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }} | 3 = {{#switch:{{{1}}} | 1 = ⅓ | 2 = ⅔ | {{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }} | 4 = {{#switch:{{{1}}} | 1 = ¼ | 2 = ½ | 3 = ¾ | {{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }} | 8 = {{#switch:{{{1}}} | 1 = ⅛ | 2 = ¼ | 3 = ⅜ | 4 = ½ | 5 = ⅝ | 6 = ¾ | 7 = ⅞ | {{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }} | {{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} }}|#else: {{#switch:{{{1}}}|2=½|3="⅓"|4="¼"|8=⅛|1⁄{{{1}}}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]]

revision.comment: reverted Unicode fractions, although it works in principle
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[zh:Template:分数]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

revision.comment: added class and a default style thingy for the denominator
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ko:틀:분수]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ko:틀:분수]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[sl:Predloga:Ulomek]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} {{frac|1|16}} {{frac|3|16}} {{frac|5|16}} {{frac|7|16}} {{frac|9|16}} {{frac|11|16}} {{frac|13|16}} {{frac|15|16}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ko:틀:분수]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[sl:Predloga:Ulomek]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} {{frac|1|16}} {{frac|3|16}} {{frac|5|16}} {{frac|7|16}} {{frac|9|16}} {{frac|11|16}} {{frac|13|16}} {{frac|15|16}} {{frac|5|32}} {{frac|27|32}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ko:틀:분수]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[sl:Predloga:Ulomek]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

{{pp-template}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} {{frac|1|16}} {{frac|3|16}} {{frac|5|16}} {{frac|7|16}} {{frac|9|16}} {{frac|11|16}} {{frac|13|16}} {{frac|15|16}} {{frac|5|32}} {{frac|27|32}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ko:틀:분수]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[sl:Predloga:Ulomek]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]

{{pp-template}}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} This template builds nicer-looking [[common fraction]]s. It takes one, two or three parameters: the optional integer (maybe signed), the optional numerator and the required denominator; in this order. ; {{frac|A|B|C}}: {{frac|A|B|C}} (integer, numerator and denominator) : A<s style="display:none">+</s><small><sup>B</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>C</sub></small> ; {{frac|A|B}}: {{frac|A|B}} (numerator and denominator) : <small><sup>A</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>B</sub></small> ; {{frac|A}}: {{frac|A}} (denominator only) : <small><sup>1</sup><big>⁄</big><sub>A</sub></small> {{frac|2}} {{frac|3}} {{frac|4}} {{frac|8}} {{frac|1|2}} {{frac|1|3}} {{frac|2|3}} {{frac|1|4}} {{frac|2|4}} {{frac|3|4}} {{frac|1|8}} {{frac|2|8}} {{frac|3|8}} {{frac|4|8}} {{frac|5|8}} {{frac|6|8}} {{frac|7|8}} {{frac|1|16}} {{frac|3|16}} {{frac|5|16}} {{frac|7|16}} {{frac|9|16}} {{frac|11|16}} {{frac|13|16}} {{frac|15|16}} {{frac|5|32}} {{frac|27|32}} [[de:Vorlage:Bruch]] [[es:Plantilla:Fracción]] [[ko:틀:분수]] [[mk:Шаблон:Дроп]] [[ja:Template:分数]] [[simple:Template:Frac]] [[sl:Predloga:Ulomek]] [[zh:Template:Fraction]]
{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|#else: {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|#else: 1⁄{{{1}}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: adjust spacing per discussion on talk page
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} }} }} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: nowrap is needed, if the numerator or denominator has spaces, per one of the examples

revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: show fraction slash when no input per suggestion of [[User:76.65.128.198]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{1|}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} |⁄ }} }} }} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}}{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{1|}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} |⁄ }} }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Restore space. There was a long discussion, previously. Consensus then was that the space should be there both for display and for copy/paste. Any change should be discussed on the talk page.
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{1|}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} |⁄ }} }} }} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{1|}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} |⁄ }} }} }} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{1|}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} |⁄ }} }} }} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{1|}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} |⁄ }} }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Add hairspace at the start to prevent the preceding non-fractal number to be reduced in size as well
Notifying subject page of move discussion on [[Template talk:Frac#Requested move 21 March 2021 |Template talk:Frac]]
revision.text: {{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Fraction|2=Template talk:Frac#Requested move 21 March 2021 }} {{Zero width space}}{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{1|}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} |⁄ }} }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: DannyS712 moved page [[Template:Frac]] to [[Template:Fraction]] without leaving a redirect: [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]; consensus at [[Template talk:Fraction]] (redirect suppressed per [[WP:PMRC#4]])
revision.text: {{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Fraction|2=Template talk:Frac#Requested move 21 March 2021 }} {{Zero width space}}{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{1}}} {{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{1|}}} |1⁄{{{1}}} |⁄ }} }} }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: use TemplateStyles for all fraction, not just sr implementation
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]
{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}}
{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fraction here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{1}}}+{{{2}}}⁄{{{3}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{1}}}⁄{{{2}}}|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|1⁄{{{1}}}|⁄}}}}}} {{documentation}}
